hypothesis: 0.5->0.4->0.30 all improved; continuing the trend may still help
next_move: if better, try 0.20; if worse, 0.30 is the sweet spot

replacements.old: WARMDOWN_RATIO = 0.30   # fraction of time budget for LR warmdown
replacements.new: WARMDOWN_RATIO = 0.25   # fraction of time budget for LR warmdown

hypothesis: more time at peak LR may still improve val_bpb if the model is not yet overfitting
next_move: if worse than 0.25 but better than 0.30, settle at 0.25

replacements.old: WARMDOWN_RATIO = 0.30   # fraction of time budget for LR warmdown
replacements.new: WARMDOWN_RATIO = 0.20   # fraction of time budget for LR warmdown

hypothesis: more momentum in Adam may help embedding/unembedding convergence in the fixed budget
next_move: if better, try 0.90; if worse, 0.8 is correct

hypothesis: standard Adam beta1=0.9 may outperform the non-standard 0.8
next_move: if worse, the low beta1 is intentional for the fixed short budget

hypothesis: larger effective batch may give more stable gradient estimates and better val_bpb per optimizer step
next_move: if worse, the current batch size is well-tuned; if better, consider 2^18

commit_message: Try sliding window in layer 1 only (LS pattern)
description: set WINDOW_PATTERN from 'L' to 'LS' — full attention in layer 0, half-context in layer 1, full in layer 2
hypothesis: pure-L gave worse results before, but with the current better-tuned schedule the small efficiency gain may make up the difference
next_move: if worse, keep all-L; the previous experiment showed this costs ~0.005 val_bpb

replacements.old: WINDOW_PATTERN = "L"    # sliding window pattern: L=full, S=half context
replacements.new: WINDOW_PATTERN = "LS"   # sliding window pattern: L=full, S=half context

description: raise ASPECT_RATIO from 64 to 80; model_dim goes from 256 to 384
hypothesis: a slightly wider model under the 5-min budget may have more capacity and better val_bpb
next_move: if slower and worse, the current size is right; if better but slower the capacity gain is worth it

description: increase ns_steps from 5 to 6 in the MuonAdamW optimizer call
hypothesis: one more Newton-Schulz step gives a more accurate polar factor; marginal cost on MPS
next_move: if no improvement, ns_steps=5 is sufficient
